calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-20-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing
Off Calendar Jan-05-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Lynn O'Malley-Taylor, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Vivian Leung Lerche, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiffs, AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB, A FEDERAL SAVINGS BANK AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK, A UTAH STATE CHARTERED BANK,
Order Granting Waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant BRITTANY M. MCCLINTON, AKA BRITTANY MARIE MCCLINTON, AN INDIVIDUAL,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:
Damages: $80,597.79
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.0
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $856.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $81,453.79

Judgment signed in open court.
